title: glandularia hassleriana
intro: Glandularia hassleriana, also known as Verbena hassleriana, is a flowering plant species in the Verbena family, native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Glandularia hassleriana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
